allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\fnm_multishells","$env:USERPROFILE\\.volta\\bin\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ "FOUND: $p" } }; "nvm:"; Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\\nvm"; \(Get-Command pnpm,yarn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
